LJCPersonCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

LJCPersonCtor2.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the provided values.

LJCPersonCtor3.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the values copied from the provided object.

Clone.summary: Creates a deep copy of the current object.

SetOriginalState.summary: Sets the original values from the current property values and clears the changed properties.

summary.summary: Gets or sets the ID value.

ParentID.summary: Gets or sets the ParentID value.

summary.summary: Gets or sets the Name value.
Gets or sets the Description value.

ChangedProperties.summary: Gets a set of strings containing the names of properties that have been changed since the last call to .
